backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Mitsubishi dealership backend, defining all data stores (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media, visitor stats, etc.), their ID counters, and mixing in authorization and blob storage modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the 'Test whoAmI' debug button feature was implemented in frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx with high confidence, referencing test ID REQ-8.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS entry file for the frontend.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that configures TanStack Router with all public routes (Beranda, vehicles, promo, blog, etc.) and auth-guarded admin routes, wrapped with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating or editing admin users, validating Principal ID format and submitting create/update mutations with role selection.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component that displays admin users with their principal ID, role badge, creation date, and edit/delete action buttons, disabling delete when only one admin remains.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component that lets admins pick a banner image (main or CTA) from existing media assets, displaying them in a radio-group grid with blob URL previews.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A dialog form for creating or editing blog posts, with delegation identity token validation before submitting create/update mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Displays a table of all blog posts with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, using confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Renders a grid of uploaded media assets with blob URL previews, and supports copying asset IDs and deleting assets after delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload zone that validates file type and size, tracks per-file upload progress, and uploads accepted files to the canister via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: A dialog form component for creating or editing a passenger vehicle, with fields for name, description, and base price, using create/update vehicle mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all passenger vehicles with options to edit, delete, and toggle publish status, including a confirmation dialog for deletion.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a promotion, with fields for title, description, start date, and end date, using create/update promotion mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all promotions with their period and active status, supporting edit, delete, and active status toggle actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: A dialog form for creating or editing a testimonial, with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1–5), using create/update testimonial mutation hooks.
Displays a table of all testimonials showing customer name, content, and star rating, with edit and delete action buttons delegated via props.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Renders a horizontal bar chart showing the top 10 most visited pages, converting bigint URL/count pairs to chart data with truncated display URLs. Shows a skeleton loader while loading and an empty state message when no data is available.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart displaying visitor trends over the last 30 days, converting bigint timestamp/count pairs to formatted date labels. Handles loading and empty states with a skeleton and placeholder message.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: React component that protects admin routes by validating Internet Identity, checking delegation expiry, syncing the principal to localStorage, and redirecting unauthenticated users to /login.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a static list of five latest article links as clickable buttons that navigate to individual blog post pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: A fixed bottom action bar with four buttons for calling, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and a navigation menu. The menu button toggles a dropdown with site navigation links, closing on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Renders a set of toggle buttons for selecting a vehicle variant, defaulting to the first variant and notifying the parent component of selection changes via a callback.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a full-width CTA banner image (loaded from media assets for authenticated users or a static fallback) with an overlay containing a WhatsApp contact link built from website settings.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with dealer contact info, social media links, visitor stats, and dynamic content sourced from website settings with fallback defaults.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Renders a page-specific hero banner with a title, icon, background color, and subtitle determined by the current pathname, with special text color handling for Mobil Niaga pages.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel section of up to 8 family car (Mobil Keluarga) vehicle cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
Displays a carousel section of up to 8 commercial vehicle (Mobil Niaga) cards fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the hero banner section using a configurable image from website settings (authenticated users) or a fallback static image, overlaid with the site name and tagline.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, and a collapsible mobile menu that closes on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Renders like and share buttons for a vehicle, tracking counts via the useProductInteractions hook and triggering the native Web Share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicle cards (Produk Unggulan) fetched from the catalog API, with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: A search input section that redirects users to the Mobil Keluarga page with a query parameter when they submit a search.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three dealership selling points (flexible installments, low down payment, negotiable price) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section with two paragraphs describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an authorized dealer.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector component allowing users to choose a vehicle variant and color, notifying the parent via a callback when the selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying a vehicle's placeholder image, name, formatted base price in IDR, and a link to its detail page.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian-language string constants for UI labels, validation messages, and success/error/confirmation messages used across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Custom hook that queries admin dashboard statistics via the backend actor; currently returns zeroed default values as the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting admin users via the backend actor, using `protectedCall` for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations and publish-toggling on blog posts; all mutation and query functions are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on commercial vehicle categories; all backend calls are stubbed with warnings since the backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a public contact form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting contact submissions; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting a public credit simulation form; the backend call is stubbed and only logs the submitted data.
Provides React Query hooks for fetching and deleting credit simulations; both are stubbed since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status to child components via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, uploading, and deleting media assets via the backend actor, with progress callback support on upload.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for getting and mutating product like/share counts; all backend calls are stubbed, and a combined `useProductInteractions` hook is exported for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions (get, create, update, delete, toggle active status), all stubbed out with errors since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all vehicle catalogs and a single vehicle with its catalog, both returning empty/null stubs as the backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a single React Query hook to fetch website settings from the backend actor, returning null on error.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on testimonials (get, create, update, delete), all stubbed out with errors since the backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on vehicles (get all, get by id, create, update, delete, toggle publish, get catalog), all stubbed out as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch visitor stats (active), visitor trend, and page views (both disabled pending backend implementation).
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that now does nothing, as tracking has been moved to PublicLayout.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch and update website settings via the backend actor, with protected mutation requiring an authenticated identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin panel layout with a collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, click-outside collapse, and a logout handler that clears query cache and redirects to login.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page layout that wraps content with Navbar, optional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar, and handles visitor tracking on each route change via the backend actor.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
Admin page for managing admin users with list, add, edit, and delete functionality using a dialog and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Admin page for managing blog articles with add/edit dialog and React Query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder admin page for commercial vehicles management, directing users to use the passenger vehicles menu instead.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Admin page that displays a sorted table of credit simulation submissions fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page showing stat cards for vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and visitors using the useAdminStats hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Admin page displaying a sorted table of contact/lead submissions from the website.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Admin page for uploading and browsing media assets, with cache invalidation after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles with add/edit dialog support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit dialog support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit dialog and a confirmation alert dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin page that displays real-time visitor statistics (total, daily, weekly, monthly, online now, page views) with auto-refresh every 15 seconds, plus trend and top-pages charts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for editing website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, and banner images, with form state synced from backend and identity validation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, syncs auth tokens, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage that composes multiple section components including banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about us, features, search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for a blog article detail view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for the blog listing view, displaying an 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form collecting name, address, phone, email, vehicle interest, DP, tenor, and message, submitted via the useContactForm hook with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for a family vehicle, showing image, price, variant/color selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features, looked up by slug from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page for family vehicles, fetching all vehicle catalogs and rendering up to 8 as VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Public listing page for commercial vehicles filtered by category slug, rendering up to 8 VehicleCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Public detail page for a commercial vehicle, showing image, price, variant selector, action buttons, and tabs for specifications and features, looked up by slug and category from the catalog.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Displays a grid of three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to the respective category route.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page for promotions, showing a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form page that lets users select a vehicle, enter down payment and tenor, calculates estimated monthly installments, and submits the simulation via a mutation hook.
Placeholder page for customer testimonials, showing a message that the page is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces for frontend use that mirror backend types, including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleCatalog, AdminUser, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and other domain models.
frontend/src/utils/apiClient.ts: Provides a centralized wrapper for ICP canister calls with pre-call authentication validation, authorization error detection, and session management utilities.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting canister-stored Uint8Array blob data into browser-displayable object URLs and checking MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Exports a single function that calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate given vehicle price, down payment, and tenor in months.
frontend/src/utils/tokenStorage.ts: Manages persistence of the authenticated Internet Identity principal ID and session expiry in localStorage, with helpers to save, retrieve, validate, and clear session state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides form validation utility functions (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) and a `validateDelegationIdentity` function that checks ICP identity validity, including expiration and anonymous principal detection.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Provides browser-side visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/persistence, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 7) for a Motoko/ICP admin canister project, documenting architectural notes, known authorization issues, existing features, and pending audit/fix requests (AR-1 through AR-6+) for super_admin role enforcement.
